languages.text: "У кого-то в свите есть идеи, как это использовать?"
"Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"
languages.original_text: "У кого-то в свите есть идеи, как это использовать?"

traits.locale_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"
"Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"
"Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

languages.text: 「私の側近には、この使い方についてアイデアを持っている人がいるか？」
languages.original_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

traits.locale_text: 「私の側近には、この使い方についてアイデアを持っている人がいますか？」

languages.text: «¿Tiene algún miembro de mi séquito ideas para utilizar esta información?».
languages.original_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Tiene algún miembro de mi séquito ideas para utilizar esta información?».

languages.text: “我的随从中，有谁知道该怎么利用这一点吗？”
languages.original_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

traits.locale_text: “我的随从中，有谁知道该怎么利用这一点吗？”

languages.text: "Hat dazu irgendjemand in meinem Gefolge etwas zu sagen?"
languages.original_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

traits.locale_text: "Hat dazu irgendjemand in meinem Gefolge etwas zu sagen?"

languages.text: "Maiyetimin bunu nasıl kullanabileceğimize dair bir fikri var mı?"
languages.original_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

traits.locale_text: "Maiyetimin bunu nasıl kullanabileceğimize dair bir fikri var mı?"

languages.text: « Quelqu'un dans mon entourage a-t-il une idée permettant d'exploiter ces informations ? »
languages.original_text: "Does anyone in my retinue have any ideas on how to use this?"

traits.locale_text: « Quelqu'un dans mon entourage a-t-il une idée permettant d'exploiter ces informations ? »
